1. Step 1

## 🖥 Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.11.2 |
| TRISHUL version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| aiohttp version | e.g. 3.9.1 |

```bash
python --version
pip show trishul-scanner aiohttp rich click jinja2
```
